I want an iced coffee because I am running late for work.
Good morning! What can I get started for you today?
I need a fast drink because my train is leaving in five minutes!
I can make an iced espresso quickly so you can catch it.
You need to fill out this form if you are a new patient.
Hi, I have an appointment with the doctor at ten o'clock.
Please sit down over there after you write your name here.
Should I call you if my pain gets worse while I wait?
The airline changed my gate number three times.
Excuse me, I cannot find my blue suitcase on the carousel.
Let me scan your printed ticket voucher to locate the bag.
I will miss my connecting flight because of this delay!
